Windows 8 Reimagined

Into the wondering world

C# Unity3D Museum Exhibition

It is a project for Microsoft Taiwan. At the time Windows 8 just about to release, Microsoft Taiwan would like to promote their newst Operating System Windows 8 at an art festival in Taipei, Taiwan. We, therefore, created this art installation for Microsoft. In the installation, we used an All-In-One windows 8 computer to create an immersive and playable environment. While giving the audience a fun and special moment, they also experienced all of the new highlight features that comes with Windows 8.

© Yu-Jen Lin
